utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我而家喺北卡羅來納州嘅Suarez，近住美國銀行體育場，我想搵間餐廳食晚飯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你搵餐廳嗰陣，有冇啲咩特別嘢係你最重視嘅呢？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你嘅價錢預算係幾多呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 十六蚊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我嘅預算係一萬六千蚊。即係，我想要間餐廳有瑪格麗特特價嘢，同埋我喺Kansas度可以落單。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請等等。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Las Margarita墨西哥餐廳。

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 已經搞掂晒啦，祝你用餐愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵華盛頓特區嘅餐廳。我喺國會大廈附近。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他需要幫忙嘅地方呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵間環境清靜啲嘅餐廳。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，喺邊個城市呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你係咪想搵任何菜式，但係環境要清靜嘅呢？

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到一間叫Sotto Sopra嘅餐廳，有4.2星評分，地址係巴爾的摩查爾斯北街405號，郵編21201。佢提供由農場直送嘅現代意大利菜同埋美酒，餐廳係一間充滿藝術氣息嘅優雅聯排別墅。食物好美味，服務質素高，有好多葡萄酒選擇，甜品亦都好出色。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁就好好啦。可唔可以幫我預訂呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀！你想幾點呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀！

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你用餐愉快，再見。

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒。我淨係需要咁多。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你用餐愉快。再見。

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。我可以點幫你呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，我明白。你有冇話特別想食咩呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，等我睇吓你附近有咩批薩餐廳先。請稍等。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請稍等。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我會推薦你Uncle Vito's Slice of New York呢間餐廳，行路就到㗎啦。

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.text: 我諗，我可以出去食漢堡包。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Super Duper Burgers係一間你可以去嘅地方，佢係一間自助式連鎖店，用本地食材製作漢堡包、薯條同有機奶昔。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 另一個選擇係Roam Artisan Burgers，佢係一間自助式餐廳，提供用可持續食材製作嘅特色漢堡包，仲有奶昔同配菜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第三間係Popson's Burgers，佢係一間現代小餐館，氣氛休閒，喺一個光猛嘅空間提供即叫即做嘅肉餅、熱狗同奶昔。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有另一間係 Umami Burger Marina，呢間係一間好熱鬧嘅連鎖分店，提供高級漢堡、配菜同埋創意雞尾酒，環境好時尚。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 下一間係 Pearl's Deluxe Burgers，呢間係一間冇花巧嘅櫃檯服務餐廳，提供創意配料嘅牛肉、水牛、火雞同素食漢堡。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想揀邊間呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，我哋可以揀 Pearl's Deluxe 嗰間。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我會同你分享地址，請稍等一陣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 地址：708 Post St, San Francisco, CA 94109。營業時間：上午11點至晚上10點，今日有開。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，正呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他需要呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇啦。咁就係咁多啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，再見。
